name: White Chocolate Raspberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
For crust: Put pecans in a small bowl with butter and microwave on high for 1.5 minutes.
Stir dry ingredients together in a 10-inch springform pan. Add butter and nuts and mix well. Pat onto bottom and sides.
For filling: Beat cream cheese until light. Add sugar and beat until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition. Add remaining ingredients except berries and mix well. Pour into pan. Drop berries on top and push down with fork so that batter covers them. Bake at 350°F for 1.5 hours, placing a pan of water on the bottom rack.
Remove from oven and run knife around the edge to loosen from pan and prevent a cracked cake when cooling.
For topping: Stir sugar and cornstarch well in a saucepan. Add berries and water and cook over medium heat until thick and bubbly. Stir in rum if desired. Pour over cooled cake (refrigerate the cake for a day first, then put topping on just before serving).
